name: CLX - Sentinel Cost Collector Supabase v1

nodes.name: Webhook
nodes.notes: DEACTIVATED. Supabase does NOT expose per-day programmatic billing — Pro plan is fixed $25/mo + variable database/storage/egress. This collector records the prorated daily portion of the fixed monthly cost. For monthly variable overages (extra storage, extra bandwidth), use the dashboard's budget-update form to add a one-line manual adjustment when the Supabase invoice arrives.
